_comment: Path prefix -> upstream MCP. prefix = <project>/<server> (project carried in the URL = project-awareness). TWO route kinds: (1) remote HTTP upstreams have `target` (a real remote URL, never a localhost proxy) + `authEnv` (env var name the launchd wrapper exports from 1Password; tokens are NEVER stored here). (2) `spawn` routes are dbhub children the daemon supervises itself — one long-lived Streamable-HTTP process per project on 127.0.0.1:<port>, serving that project's DB tiers as TOML sources (dbhub/<project>.toml; tools execute_sql_<tier> / search_objects_<tier>, prod tiers readonly). Render routes: the gateway auto-selects the workspace per MCP session (`renderWorkspace` pins the owner id) so clients never see 'no workspace set'. Legacy per-tier crystaldba postgres-mcp routes (ports 8811-8841) were retired 2026-07-12 after the dbhub migration.
